examples: One month before the deadline we see the hollowness of these promises.
Feel the hollowness inside of your heart.
I think it is the feeling of lose and hollowness.
You remember that God-awful empty feeling you remember being sucked into your own chest, that feeling of hollowness.
He surveyed boxes and suitcases, fingered the electric drill, tapped on the wine barrel, which echoed with a dim hollowness.
